use_codes.desc: FOR THE MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD)

indications.text:
YUPELRI (revefenacin) inhalation solution is indicated for the maintenance treatment of
patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

YUPELRI is indicated for the maintenance treatment of patients with chronic obstructive
pulmonary disease (COPD).

obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
